case_title: NEVILLE WRIGHT VS. 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE LINE ON GREEN CARD** SERVED OCT-11-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NEVILLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP $1,473.96 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,538.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,578.00 FILED BY WRIGHT, NEVILLE AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF NEVILLE WRIGHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP, REPRESENTED BY KEVIN XIE, AUTO CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UUNDER SUBMISSION ON 12-1-22)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:DOREN E HOHL] FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, NEVILLE AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KEVIN XIE, AUTO CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE GROUP
